alt: A mother jaguar gently holding her small cub by the neck
caption: A mother jaguar carries her cub to safety in her mouth. Cubs stay with their mother for about two years to learn hunting.
attributionText: Photo by John Harrison at https://www.flickr.com/photos/15512543@N04/ via Wikimedia Commons, CC BY-SA 3.0
